title: Spicy Creamy Romantic Algerian Apples Stir-fry
description: A low-fat-friendly, spicy and creamy dish featuring apples cooked in a Tandoor-inspired sauce with a romantic touch.

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes (or crushed red chili)
Diced fresh apple
ingredients.notes: Sliced into thin wedges or cubes

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine Greek yogurt and apple cider vinegar. Stir in ground cumin, coriander, turmeric powder, and red pepper flakes. Mix well until smooth.
Fold in low-fat mayonnaise gently to avoid breaking the creamy texture of the dish. Add salt to taste for seasoning.
Gently mix in diced fresh apple pieces, ensuring they are distributed evenly throughout the sauce.
If desired, sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese over the top before serving as a garnish.
